name: Paginated

unions.name: Request
unions.comment: Encapsulates an API request for a list of items of type `a`.

unions.name: Response
unions.comment:
Describes an API response.

A response may either be Partial (there are more pages of results yet
to be fetched), or Complete (all records have been fetched). The
response includes all of the items fetched in order.

aliases.name: RequestOptions
aliases.type: { method : String, headers : List Header, url : String, body : Body, decoder : Decoder a, timeout : Maybe Time, withCredentials : Bool }

values.name: httpRequest
values.comment:
Convert a `Request` to a `Http.Request` that can then be sent via
`Http.send`.

values.name: post
values.type: String -> Body -> Decoder a -> Request a

values.name: request
values.comment:
Create a custom request, allowing the specification of HTTP
headers and other options. For example:

    Paginated.request
        { method = "GET"
        , headers = [Http.header "Private-Token" "XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX"]
        , url = url
        , body = Http.emptyBody
        , decoder = decoder
        , timeout = Nothing
        , withCredentials = False
        }

values.name: send
values.type: (Result Error (Response a) -> msg) -> Request a -> Cmd msg

values.name: update
values.comment: Append two paginated responses, collecting the results within.
values.type: Response a -> Response a -> Response a
